/usr/bin/ar qc libkarkas_core.a CMakeFiles/karkas_core.dir/server/core/unit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/karkas_core.dir/server/core/terrain/terrain_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/karkas_core.dir/server/core/terrain/los_calculator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/karkas_core.dir/server/core/terrain/mobility.cpp.o CMakeFiles/karkas_core.dir/server/core/combat/combat_resolver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/karkas_core.dir/server/core/combat/engagement.cpp.o CMakeFiles/karkas_core.dir/server/core/movement/pathfinder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/karkas_core.dir/server/core/movement/movement_resolver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/karkas_core.dir/server/core/sensors/sensor_model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/karkas_core.dir/server/core/sensors/detection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/karkas_core.dir/server/core/logistics/supply_model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/karkas_core.dir/server/core/simulation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/karkas_core.dir/server/core/game_state.cpp.o CMakeFiles/karkas_core.dir/server/core/turn_executor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/karkas_core.dir/server/core/perception_generator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/karkas_core.dir/server/core/orbat_manager.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libkarkas_core.a
